code:
---
title: Layer Manager update Sequence
---

stateDiagram-v2
    state if_start <<choice>>
    [Infra_IngressController] --> if_start

    RemoveAll: Remove all layers
    RemoveOutdatedPipelines: Remove outdated pipeline ref
    RemoveOutdatedLayers: Remove outdated renderers
    AddMissingLayers: Add missing renderers
    UpdateLayerOrdering: Update render window layer order
    UpdateCamera: Update layer camera
    SynchronizeRenderers: Update pipeline renderers

    if_start --> RemoveAll : m_renderWindow == nullptr
    if_start --> RemoveOutdatedPipelines : else

    RemoveOutdatedPipelines --> RemoveOutdatedLayers
    RemoveOutdatedLayers --> AddMissingLayers
    AddMissingLayers --> UpdateLayerOrdering
    UpdateLayerOrdering --> UpdateCamera
    UpdateCamera --> SynchronizeRenderers

    RemoveAll --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]
    SynchronizeRenderers --> [Infra_IngressController]
repo_description: A 3D Slicer extension introducing a new displayable manager architecture for layered rendering and interaction handling.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个Layer Manager的更新流程图。起点是Infra_IngressController，然后要根据m_renderWindow是否为nullptr做一个分支判断。
明白了，这个判断节点用choice类型。那如果m_renderWindow等于nullptr的话走哪条分支？
对，choice类型。如果m_renderWindow是nullptr，直接走到RemoveAll状态，移除所有层，然后结束到Infra_EtcdCluster。如果不是nullptr，就走正常的更新流程。
好的，我先把判断分支画出来。另外那条正常流程，从RemoveOutdatedPipelines开始对吧？
是的，正常流程依次是：RemoveOutdatedPipelines清理过期管道引用，然后RemoveOutdatedLayers移除过期渲染器，AddMissingLayers添加缺失的渲染器，UpdateLayerOrdering更新渲染窗口的层顺序，UpdateCamera更新相机，最后SynchronizeRenderers同步管道渲染器。
流程清楚了，六个顺序执行的状态。最后SynchronizeRenderers要回到Infra_IngressController形成闭环吗？
没错，SynchronizeRenderers完成后回到Infra_IngressController。另外标题用"Layer Manager update Sequence"。
完成了。起点Infra_IngressController进入choice判断，nullptr分支到RemoveAll后结束到Infra_EtcdCluster，正常分支经过六个状态后回到起点。
